headline: Claude-Mem bridges the gap between ephemeral sessions and long-term context
lede: Maintaining deep project continuity remains the final hurdle for AI-assisted development. This integration orchestrates a hybrid search of SQLite and Chroma to ensure your coding agent remembers every architectural decision.

headline: Streamlining peer review with modular prompt sequences
lede: Drafting code reviews can be a repetitive chore that lacks structural consistency. This repository offers a playful, iterative approach to standardizing how AI assesses your codebase.

headline: Standardizing agent skills for repeatable development environments
lede: To build reliable agents, we must stop rewriting the same instruction sets. This catalog maps out a path for modular skill distribution, ensuring your agents execute tasks with repeatable precision.

headline: Automating project management via CLI-native intelligence
lede: When the sun goes down, you want your background processes running without friction. This utility manages complex development workflows through a dark-mode friendly terminal interface.

headline: Superpowers forces rigorous engineering standards into AI coding workflows
lede: AI often prioritizes velocity over stability, leading to brittle codebases and hallucinated features. By mandating TDD and git-managed worktrees, this framework brings reliable, enterprise-grade discipline to the agentic stack.

headline: Dexter transforms raw financial statements into actionable research threads
lede: Synthesizing market data is a high-throughput challenge that demands both accuracy and transparency. Dexter channels raw financial data through a structured pipeline, validating every inference step before delivering final results.

headline: Nanochat democratizes transformer training with transparent hyperparameter calibration
lede: The complexity of modern model architecture often obscures the mechanics of pretraining. This framework strips away automated abstractions, letting researchers manually tune parameters for optimal throughput on single-node GPU clusters.

headline: Calibre reaches massive adoption as the gold standard for ebook management
lede: Open source infrastructure succeeds when it solves a singular problem with absolute reliability. Calibre continues to define the category for cross-platform content management.

headline: ChatDev provides a historical blueprint for multi-agent software organizations
lede: Understanding the collaborative behavior of agents requires a look at foundational research. This repository preserves the logic behind virtual software companies, serving as a primary text for autonomous collaboration.

headline: Maestro offers fine-grained orchestration for complex local workflows
lede: Complex environments require a steady hand to maintain order. This terminal-first utility allows developers to coordinate disparate processes from a single, rugged control center.
